title: Market Relations
compiled_truth: Market Relations is an external contact at [Nyiso](companies/nyiso). Over the corpus period (2000-11-14 to 2002-03-04), Market Relations sent 79 and received 131 emails, totalling 210 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (14), [Tie List Server](people/tie-list-server-nyiso) (7), [Rring](people/rring) (4), [D  Thomas](people/d-thomas) (3), [Nyiso Tech Exchange](people/nyiso-tech-exchange-global2000) (1).
timeline:
